_source: Industrial maintenance handbooks, Reliability engineering guides, Vibration analysis standards, CMMS best practices
_note: Long-tail industrial maintenance. Predictive maintenance, bearing analysis, alignment procedures, reliability metrics, troubleshooting.

iso_standards.zone_a: <2.8 mm/s RMS; newly commissioned machines; excellent condition
iso_standards.zone_b: 2.8-7.1 mm/s; acceptable for unrestricted operation; normal condition
iso_standards.zone_c: 7.1-11.2 mm/s; unsatisfactory; plan corrective maintenance; degraded condition
iso_standards.zone_d: >11.2 mm/s; unacceptable; immediate action required; severe faults present

fault_frequencies.imbalance: 1× RPM; smooth sine wave; radial vibration; increases with speed; common cause: material buildup, lost balance weight
fault_frequencies.misalignment: 1×, 2×, 3× RPM (harmonics); axial and radial vibration; parallel or angular misalignment; requires realignment
fault_frequencies.looseness: Many harmonics; erratic; may have half-order peaks; loose foundation bolts, worn bearings, loose fits

bearing_defects.bpfi: Ball Pass Frequency Inner race; high frequency; modulated by 1× RPM; inner race fault
bearing_defects.bpfo: Ball Pass Frequency Outer race; high frequency; not modulated; outer race fault
bearing_defects.bsf: Ball Spin Frequency; very high frequency; rolling element defect
bearing_defects.ftf: Fundamental Train Frequency (cage); low frequency; <1× RPM; cage defect

fault_frequencies.gear_mesh: Number of teeth × RPM; sidebands at 1× RPM = misalignment; broken tooth = impulses at 1× shaft speed

vibration_analysis.data_collection: Accelerometer on bearing housing; measure radial (horizontal/vertical) and axial; consistent location; same machine state (load, speed)
vibration_analysis.trending: Plot vibration over time; sudden change = investigate; gradual rise = plan maintenance; stable = good

electrical_hot_spots.delta_t: Temperature difference from ambient or similar component; >10°C = investigate; >20°C = urgent
electrical_hot_spots.causes: Loose connections (high resistance), overloaded circuit, imbalanced phases, harmonic distortion
electrical_hot_spots.severity: Hot bolted connections = fire risk; thermal cycling weakens connection further (positive feedback)
electrical_hot_spots.inspection_frequency: Quarterly for critical equipment; annually for general; load equipment to >40% for accurate reading

thermography.mechanical_applications: Bearing overheating, steam trap performance, insulation defects, refractory damage, heat exchanger fouling
thermography.emissivity: Shiny surfaces (0.1-0.3) read low; paint or tape known emissivity surface; oxidized/painted metals (0.8-0.95) read accurately

wear_metals_ppm.iron: Gears, cylinder walls; <50 ppm normal; >200 ppm abnormal wear; sudden spike = investigate
wear_metals_ppm.copper: Bearings, bushings; <20 ppm normal; >100 ppm excessive wear
wear_metals_ppm.aluminum: Pistons, housings; <10 ppm normal; sudden increase = scuffing or cavitation
wear_metals_ppm.chromium: Piston rings, bearings; <5 ppm normal; indicator of severe wear if elevated

oil_condition.viscosity: Should be within ±10% of new oil; low = dilution (fuel, coolant); high = oxidation or contamination
oil_condition.acid_number: Measures oxidation; increases with use; replace oil when TAN exceeds limit (typically 2.0-2.5 mg KOH/g)
oil_condition.water_content: <200 ppm acceptable; >500 ppm promotes rust and depletes additives; >1000 ppm urgent oil change

oil_analysis.particle_count_iso_4406: Counts particles >4µm, >6µm, >14µm per mL; example 18/16/13 = normal hydraulic system; 21/19/16 = dirty, service needed
oil_analysis.sampling: Take from circulating system mid-stream (not sump bottom); consistent location; label with equipment ID, hours, date

ultrasonic_testing.applications: Bearing condition (early fault detection), compressed air leaks, steam trap testing, electrical arcing/corona
ultrasonic_testing.bearing_monitoring: Decibel level trending; compare to baseline; 8 dB increase from baseline = lubrication needed; 12-16 dB = early bearing fault
ultrasonic_testing.leak_detection: Compressed air, vacuum systems; converts ultrasonic to audible; can hear leaks in noisy environments; quantify CFM loss
ultrasonic_testing.frequency: 40 kHz typical; detects high-frequency emissions not audible to human ear

dial_indicator_reverse_method.setup: Mount indicators on one shaft; measure runout on other shaft; rotate shafts together; take readings at 0°, 90°, 180°, 270°
dial_indicator_reverse_method.offset_calculation: Vertical: (Top + Bottom) / 2; positive = move up, negative = move down; Horizontal: (Left + Right) / 2
dial_indicator_reverse_method.angularity_calculation: Difference in readings 180° apart; indicates angular misalignment; shim or move one machine
dial_indicator_reverse_method.tolerances: ±2 mils offset, ±1 mil/inch angularity for general purpose; ±0.5 mils for high speed (>3600 RPM)

laser_alignment.advantages: Faster, more accurate (±0.1 mils), less skill required, can align without rotation (sag compensation)
laser_alignment.procedure: Mount laser and detector on shafts; rotate to 3+ positions; software calculates shims and movements
laser_alignment.soft_foot_check: Must correct before alignment; loosen each foot bolt individually; >2 mils deflection = soft foot; shim or machine base repair
laser_alignment.thermal_growth: Account for operating temperature expansion; vertical growth typical; laser tools have thermal compensation feature

coupling_types.rigid: No misalignment tolerance; perfect alignment required; used when precision alignment achievable and maintained
coupling_types.flexible: Tolerates some misalignment; gear (high torque), grid (shock absorption), elastomeric (vibration damping); still needs good alignment for life
coupling_types.misalignment_effects: Premature bearing failure, seal leaks, coupling wear, shaft fatigue, vibration, energy loss

bearing_types.ball_bearings: Point contact; high speed; moderate load; low friction; 10,000-50,000 hrs life

roller_bearings.cylindrical: Line contact; high radial load; no thrust; used in gearboxes
roller_bearings.tapered: High radial + thrust load; can preload; wheel bearings, gearboxes
roller_bearings.spherical: Self-aligning; handles misalignment; moderate load; used where alignment difficult

bearing_types.sleeve_bearings: Hydrodynamic lubrication; oil wedge supports shaft; high load; low speed; requires minimum RPM for film

grease_lubrication.nlgi_grade: NLGI 2 most common (peanut butter consistency); NLGI 0-1 for low temp/high speed; NLGI 3 for high temp/vibration
grease_lubrication.grease_quantity: Formula: Grease (oz) = 0.114 × OD (inches) × Width (inches); overfilling damages seals and overheats
grease_lubrication.frequency: Hours / (14 × speed factor); 1800 RPM bearing might need regreasing every 2000 hours; adjust for environment
grease_lubrication.purging: Add new grease; run bearing to purge old grease through relief port; prevents overpressurization

oil_lubrication.oil_bath: Oil level to center of lowest rolling element; overfilling = churning, overheating; underfilling = starvation
oil_lubrication.oil_ring: Ring rotates in sump, carries oil to bearing; for horizontal shafts; simple, reliable; max speed ~3600 RPM
oil_lubrication.forced_lubrication: Pump circulates oil; cooling, filtration possible; high-speed, high-load applications
oil_lubrication.oil_mist: Fine oil mist delivered to bearing; for high speed; prevents contamination; used in paper mills

lubrication.viscosity_selection: ISO VG 32 for high speed; ISO VG 68 general purpose; ISO VG 150 low speed/high load; use bearing manufacturer chart

failure_modes.spalling: Flaking of bearing surface; normal end-of-life failure if occurs after calculated L10 life; premature if before
failure_modes.brinelling: Impact damage; dents in races; causes vibration; from shock loads or installation damage
failure_modes.false_brinelling: Fretting wear; looks like brinelling but from vibration while not rotating; oil/grease worn away; red/brown residue
failure_modes.smearing: Sliding contact under load; inadequate lubrication; metal transfer; often from locked bearing during installation
failure_modes.electric_erosion: Current passing through bearing; pitting, fluting; VFDs common cause; use insulated bearings or shaft grounding
failure_modes.contamination: Dirt, water, metal particles; accelerates wear; 80% of bearing failures from contamination; use sealed bearings or purge seals

installation.heating_method: Induction heater or hot oil bath; heat to 100-120°C (212-250°F); thermal expansion allows easy installation on shaft
installation.cold_mounting: Press or drive on shaft; apply force to race being press-fit; NEVER through rolling elements (damages races)
installation.clearance_check: Measure internal clearance after installation; should be C3 (>normal) to account for interference fit reducing clearance
installation.storage: Keep in original packaging; horizontal position; vibration-free; moderate temperature; check preservation oil if >3 years old

mtbf_mttf.mtbf: Mean Time Between Failures; repairable systems; MTBF = Total operating time / Number of failures
mtbf_mttf.mttf: Mean Time To Failure; non-repairable systems; expected life before failure
mtbf_mttf.example: 10 pumps run 1000 hours each (10,000 total hours), 2 failures; MTBF = 10,000 / 2 = 5,000 hours

availability.world_class: >95% for production equipment; >99% for critical equipment
availability.calculation_example: Equipment runs 8,000 hours, down for maintenance 200 hours; Availability = 8,000 / (8,000 + 200) = 97.6%

oee_overall_equipment_effectiveness.availability: Actual run time / Planned run time (accounts for breakdowns)
oee_overall_equipment_effectiveness.performance: Actual output / Standard output (accounts for speed losses)
oee_overall_equipment_effectiveness.quality: Good parts / Total parts (accounts for defects)
oee_overall_equipment_effectiveness.world_class: OEE >85%; typical manufacturing 60-70%; reveals hidden losses

six_big_losses.improvement: Track each loss category; address biggest contributors first (Pareto principle)

no_flow_or_low_flow.causes: Pump not primed, suction line leak (air ingestion), clogged strainer, impeller damaged, wrong rotation
no_flow_or_low_flow.diagnostics: Check for cavitation noise, feel suction line for air leaks (use soap), check amp draw (low = not moving fluid)
no_flow_or_low_flow.fixes: Prime pump, repair air leaks, clean strainer, verify rotation (3-phase can be backwards)

excessive_vibration.causes: Cavitation (NPSHa < NPSHr), misalignment, imbalance, bearing wear, piping strain
excessive_vibration.diagnostics: Vibration analysis, check suction pressure (cavitation), alignment check
excessive_vibration.fixes: Increase NPSHa (lower pump, raise tank, reduce flow), realign, balance, replace bearings, support piping independently

seal_leaks.causes: Seal faces worn, dry running, misalignment, wrong seal for fluid, excessive vibration
seal_leaks.diagnostics: Check for scoring on seal faces, verify lubrication/cooling, alignment, vibration levels
seal_leaks.fixes: Replace seal, correct misalignment, reduce vibration, use seal flush plan if handling hot/dirty fluids

overheating.causes: Overload, single-phasing, blocked cooling, high ambient temp, voltage imbalance
overheating.diagnostics: Measure amp draw on all 3 phases (should be balanced within 5%), check voltage (should be within 5%), verify cooling fan operation
overheating.fixes: Reduce load, repair phase loss, clean cooling passages, improve ventilation, balance phases

bearing_noise.causes: Lack of lubrication, contamination, misalignment, imbalance, bearing worn
bearing_noise.diagnostics: Vibration analysis, ultrasonic testing, check bearing temperature (>180°F concerning)
bearing_noise.fixes: Relubricate (but not over-grease), replace bearing, realign load, balance rotor

high_amp_draw.causes: Overload, low voltage, shorted turns, rotor bar breakage
high_amp_draw.diagnostics: Compare to nameplate FLA; measure voltage and current on all phases; check for mechanical binding
high_amp_draw.fixes: Reduce load, correct voltage, rewind motor (if shorted turns), replace rotor or motor

noise_and_vibration.causes: Worn gears, misalignment, contaminated oil, bearing failure, backlash excessive or insufficient
noise_and_vibration.diagnostics: Vibration analysis (gear mesh frequency), oil analysis (wear metals), backlash measurement
noise_and_vibration.fixes: Replace gears, realign, change oil, replace bearings, adjust backlash per manufacturer spec

oil_leaks.causes: Worn seals, vent plugged (pressure buildup), overfilled, cracked housing
oil_leaks.diagnostics: Check oil level, verify vent open, inspect for cracks, check seal condition
oil_leaks.fixes: Replace seals, open/clean vent, drain to proper level, repair housing

overheating.causes: Low oil level, wrong oil viscosity, overload, inadequate cooling, churning (overfilled)
overheating.diagnostics: Check oil level and grade, measure load current, feel housing for hot spots
overheating.fixes: Fill oil to proper level, use correct viscosity, reduce load, improve cooling, drain excess oil

reactive_run_to_failure.when_appropriate: Non-critical equipment, low failure consequence, low cost items
reactive_run_to_failure.disadvantages: Unplanned downtime, collateral damage, high repair cost, safety risk
reactive_run_to_failure.typical: Light bulbs, belts on non-critical equipment

preventive_time_based.when_appropriate: Predictable wear patterns, age-related failures, low criticality
preventive_time_based.disadvantages: Over-maintenance possible, doesn't catch all failures
preventive_time_based.intervals: Based on manufacturer recommendations, historical data, hours/cycles
preventive_time_based.typical: Oil changes, filter replacements, belt replacements

predictive_condition_based.when_appropriate: Critical equipment, high failure cost, measurable degradation
predictive_condition_based.advantages: Intervene before failure, optimize maintenance timing, reduce downtime
predictive_condition_based.disadvantages: Requires technology investment, skilled personnel, upfront cost
predictive_condition_based.technologies: Vibration, thermography, oil analysis, ultrasonic, motor current signature analysis
predictive_condition_based.roi: Typically 5-10× return; reduced downtime >> technology cost

proactive_reliability_centered.advantages: Addresses root causes, maximizes reliability, considers all failure modes
proactive_reliability_centered.methods: FMEA, root cause analysis, design improvements, precision maintenance
proactive_reliability_centered.focus: Prevent failures before they develop, not just detect them
